message:
🐛 Cluster dedup phase 2: fix 20 files double-counting clusters (#11096)

Replace raw 'clusters' with 'deduplicatedClusters' alias from useClusters()
in all remaining components and hooks to prevent double-counting when
multiple kubeconfig contexts point to the same physical cluster.

Files fixed (20):
- Cards: MaintenanceWindows
- Pages: HelmReleases, Services, Compliance, Cost, Insights, KarmadaOps,
  Logs, Workloads
- Mission control: FlightPlanBlueprint, useMissionControl
- Dashboard: ConfigureCardModal, ClusterSelectionDialog
- Settings: LocalClustersSection, PersistenceSection
- RBAC: CanIChecker
- Hooks: useClusterFilter, useCardRecommendations, useSearchIndex,
  useMissionSuggestions

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
